painPoints: Action queue too dominant — crowds the floor surface
Line list feels secondary — buried below queue items
No sense of plant-wide pulse — hard to assess overall health at a glance
primaryJTBD: Orient then act — read the plant state before deciding where attention goes
variantAxes: A: Floor-first — line grid dominates, queue is a compact alert strip
B: Narrative-first — SceneHeader expands, interpretation leads, queue inline below
C: Split-pane — queue fixed right rail, floor scrollable left
D: Pulse dashboard — plant health metrics anchor the top, denser layout
E: Dense/Tactical — everything visible without scrolling, compact table
